title: vetra drive holds source documents while preview drive holds instances
content:
# vetra drive holds source documents while preview drive holds instances

The system has two drives with distinct purposes:

1. **Vetra Drive** (`vetra-{hash}`) — Contains source documents: document models, document editors, and apps. This is the development drive where you define and build things.

2. **Preview Drive** (`preview-{hash}`, named "Vetra Preview") — Contains demo and preview documents (actual document instances). Used for showcasing and testing document models in action.

The separation ensures development artifacts (models, editors) stay separate from test data (document instances). Since [[document models must be added to the vetra drive by default]], new models always go to vetra, not preview.

---

- [[mcp workflows]]
description: The vetra drive contains document models and editors for development; the preview drive contains demo document instances
